title: Pufferfish skills texturepack
description: A texturepack that adds a background for the pufferfish skills mod used in the Adventures of berk modpack
body:
A resourcepack that adds a background used in the [Pufferfish's Skills
](https://modrinth.com/mod/skills) mod specifically used for a skilltree made using said mod in the modpack [Adventures of Berk](https://modrinth.com/modpack/adventures-of-berk)
